SysCron.name: ProvisioningTimeout
SysCron.description: Flip tenants stuck in provisioning INITIALIZING beyond softa.tenant.provisioning.ready-timeout-seconds (default 600s) to FAILED. Consumed by tenant-starter's TenantMaintenanceCronConsumer (CrossTenant: one message, failTimedOut sweeps all stuck tenants). Seeded via loadPreSystemData - active=true so it runs on load. (tenantJobMode uses the @JsonValue code 'CrossTenant', matching 4.cron-data.sql's DB column.)
